reforms.description: From 1986 onwards, dividend income has been taxed at only half the income tax rate, reducing the tax burden on equity investments and encouraging greater participation in the share market.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By lowering the tax on dividend income, the reform incentivizes investment in equities, potentially increasing capital available for innovation and business growth.
reforms.status_evidence: From 1986 onwards, dividend income has been taxed at only half the income tax rate.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform significantly alters the tax landscape for equity investments, encouraging a shift towards equity financing which can support innovation.
reforms.source_quote: From 1986 onwards, dividend income has been taxed at only half the income tax rate.
